name: Oven Scrambled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the melted butter evenly among four 13x9 baking dishes.
2. In a bowl, combine the eggs and salt, mixing well.
3. Gradually stir in the milk until fully combined.
4. Pour the mixture evenly into each of the prepared baking dishes.
5. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 10 minutes.
6. Continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
7. Serve immediately.
